case_id: Bo Government Hospital - waste management data entry scenario

pi_items.source: Task specification in task.json explicitly requires data element creation with this name; matches task description instructions exactly
Task specification in task.json explicitly requires data element creation with this name; matches task description instructions exactly
Task specification in task.json explicitly requires dataset creation with this name; matches task description instructions exactly

Web search confirms Bo Government Hospital is a real health facility in Sierra Leone serving over a million people and is the referral hospital for southern provinces (https://doctor4africa.com/listing/sierra-leone/hospital/bo-government-hospital/). Referenced in WHO and UNFPA documents for Sierra Leone health programs. Bo District is one of Sierra Leone's 14 districts covered by DHIS2 implementation
DHIS2 documentation confirms period format is YYYYMM for monthly data; January 2024 = 202401 format (https://docs.dhis2.org/2.26/en/developer/html/webapi_date_perid_format.html)
Task specification in task.json and task description explicitly requires entering Waste Generated value of 150
Task specification in task.json and task description explicitly requires entering Waste Incinerated value of 120
Task description specifies 'Value Type: Number'; DHIS2 supports NUMBER as a valid value type for numeric data (https://docs.dhis2.org/en/use/android-app/value-types-supported.html)
Task description explicitly specifies aggregation type as 'Sum' for both waste data elements
Task description explicitly specifies domain as 'Aggregate' for both waste data elements
Task description explicitly specifies 'Period Type: Monthly' for Hospital Waste Management dataset

privileged_info_summary: The task creates synthetic data elements for a Hospital Waste Management scenario in the DHIS2 Sierra Leone demo database. The target organization unit, Bo Government Hospital, is a verified real health facility serving southern Sierra Leone. All metadata specifications are correct: data elements 'Waste Generated (kg)' and 'Waste Incinerated (kg)' with NUMBER value type and Sum aggregation; dataset 'Hospital Waste Management' with monthly period type; data entry for period 202401 (January 2024) at Bo Government Hospital with values 150 and 120 respectively. All values match task specification requirements exactly. Sierra Leone operates DHIS2 across 14 districts and has over 1,400 health facilities in the system.
